content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: Normal volatility (Vol: 26.8%) with broad participation (Breadth: 5/8 sectors positive).

2. Which sectors are leading?
Energy & Chemicals leading: TUPRS (1W: +7.27% | 1M: +22.63%) ABOVE TREND and TRALT (1W: +6.78% | 1M: +1.97%) ABOVE TREND; Holding & Investment showing strength: DOHOL (1W: +5.45% | 1M: -0.09%) RECOVERY.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Banking & Finance lagging: ISCTR (1W: -4.07% | 1M: -16.11%) BELOW TREND and AKBNK (1W: -4.84% | 1M: -9.77%) BELOW TREND; Retail & Food under pressure: ULKER (1W: -7.76% | 1M: -17.95%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
TKFEN (1W: +12.68% | 1M: +2.46%) ABOVE TREND, BIMAS (1W: +9.84% | 1M: +1.50%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: +7.27% | 1M: +22.63%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +6.78% | 1M: +1.97%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +6.14% | 1M: -4.72%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
ISCTR (1W: -4.07% | 1M: -16.11%) BELOW TREND, YKBNK (1W: -4.07% | 1M: -9.85%) BELOW TREND, ASELS (1W: -4.35% | 1M: +12.24%) CORRECTION, ALARK (1W: -4.82% | 1M: -15.71%) BELOW TREND, AKBNK (1W: -4.84% | 1M: -9.77%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Fast 1W movers: TKFEN (1W: +12.68% | 1M: +2.46%) ABOVE TREND, BIMAS (1W: +9.84% | 1M: +1.50%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: +7.27% | 1M: +22.63%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +6.78% | 1M: +1.97%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +6.14% | 1M: -4.72%) RECOVERY.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Weak and defensive: AKBNK (1W: -4.84% | 1M: -9.77%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: -1.64% | 1M: -10.74%) BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: -4.07% | 1M: -16.11%) BELOW TREND, YKBNK (1W: -4.07% | 1M: -9.85%) BELOW TREND — avoid fresh exposure until breadth/earnings stabilize.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Mixed: EREGL (1W: -0.76% | 1M: -1.98%) BELOW TREND and ASELS (1W: -4.35% | 1M: +12.24%) CORRECTION show divergence, while TOASO (1W: +3.64% | 1M: -3.01%) RECOVERY and FROTO (1W: +0.54% | 1M: -6.82%) RECOVERY offer selective opportunities.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Clear leadership but mixed durations: TUPRS (1W: +7.27% | 1M: +22.63%) ABOVE TREND, TRMET (1W: +4.37% | 1M: +10.80%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +6.78% | 1M: +1.97%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +6.14% | 1M: -4.72%) RECOVERY and HEKTS (1W: +5.44% | 1M: -8.28%) RECOVERY — overweight energy cyclicals, trim lagging chemicals until momentum confirms.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
In this RISK-ON regime, tilt toward Energy & Chemicals and selective industrials (TUPRS, TKFEN, TOASO) and reduce weight in Banking & defensive Retail; size positions for volatility and set tight stops on names with short-term corrections.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
TUPRS (1W: +7.27% | 1M: +22.63%) ABOVE TREND for earnings/oil sensitivity, TKFEN (1W: +12.68% | 1M: +2.46%) ABOVE TREND for momentum, BIMAS (1W: +9.84% | 1M: +1.50%) ABOVE TREND for retail resilience, ASELS (1W: -4.35% | 1M: +12.24%) CORRECTION for profit-taking dynamics, AKBNK (1W: -4.84% | 1M: -9.77%) BELOW TREND for bank-specific catalysts.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Energy & Chemicals for oil-driven flows, Holding & Investment for corporate action/portfolio rotations, and Banking & Finance for earnings and liquidity signals.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Monitor XU100 reaction to near-term breakout vs recent 1-month highs (risk-on continuation) or a drop back to the recent swing lows (breadth failure); catalysts: oil price moves, FX/CBRT commentary, bank earnings, and global risk sentiment.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON market with Normal volatility (Vol: 26.8%) and 5/8 sector breadth positive; Energy & Chemicals and Holding names lead while Banks and Retail lag. Trade overweight cyclicals (TUPRS, TKFEN, BIMAS) with risk controls and avoid bank accumulation until earnings/FX stability restores confidence.
